content.en:
"Jiu'er, when did you come?"

Ye Tian was surprised when he saw Ouyang Jiu'er.

When he set off, he didn't see Ouyang Jiu'er, and when he rushed into the Forbidden Tower, he didn't see Ouyang Jiu'er's figure either.

But if you think about it carefully, it's right, how could Ouyang Jiu'er not appear for such a big thing as the taboo Gujing?

"I came a long time ago, even before you came. I cast the Shadowless Divine Step, easily passed through the blockade of the major forces, and entered the Forbidden Ancient Well!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

Ye Tian's eyes widened, a little incredulous.

However, when he thought of the magical effect of the Shadowless Divine Step, he felt normal.

When the distance is long, the shadowless Shenbu can achieve effects such as non-direct vision, imperceptibility, and unforeseeability, as if it were nothing.

In this case, no matter how strict the blockade of the major forces is, there is no way to see Ouyang Jiu'er.

At this time, Ye Tian envied Ouyang Jiu'er.

Didn't you find a lot of forbidden and strange things so early? Maybe you even found a forbidden treasure!

"Jiu'er, have you found the Forbidden Arcana?"

Ye Tian asked.

"No!" Ouyang Jiu'er replied very quickly.

"Even if you find it, I won't rob you!"

Ye Tian pursed his lips.

However, it is also normal, the Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors will fight for the Forbidden Treasure, even if Ouyang Jiu'er finds the Forbidden Treasure, he is not willing to expose it!

"I really haven't found it!" Ouyang Jiu'er explained: "No matter how precious an ordinary forbidden treasure is, it is far inferior to a forbidden divine tree root! According to the rank, the forbidden divine tree is a top-level forbidden treasure! The value of a tree root is comparable to a medium forbidden treasure! There may be so many forbidden treasures here, but I think it has been taken away a long time ago, and the forbidden treasure that is being robbed by the outside world is actually a chicken taboo treasure!"

"How do you know it's a forbidden treasure of chicken ribs?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Guess!" Ouyang Jiu'er said: "To tell you the truth, the force that destroyed the Heavenly Spirit Sect should be the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and the Heavenly Emperor Palace destroyed the Heavenly Spirit Sect and entered the Forbidden Ancient Well again. With the exploration methods of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, although it is impossible to take away all the forbidden and strange objects in a short time, it is not difficult to find the forbidden treasure. I estimated that they took away the forbidden treasure inside the forbidden ancient well, leaving only one forbidden treasure, and they also identified the use of that forbidden treasure, so they didn't take it away, it is estimated that it caused the major forces to fight!"

If others said this, Ye Tian would definitely not believe it, but Ouyang Jiu'er was a half-step domain ancestor, and he had seen a lot and knew a lot of secrets, so he naturally believed it.

"Jiu'er, there's nothing good here?"

Ye Tianchuanyin asked.

"Good things, it's those forbidden treasures!" Ouyang Jiu'er said: "However, the Forbidden Ancient Well is also a real treasure, but unfortunately there is no way to take it away!"

Ye Tian glanced at it, he also knew that the forbidden ancient well was a good thing, everyone knew it.

However, he estimated that none of the major forces would be able to occupy the Forbidden Ancient Well, and eventually the Forbidden Ancient Well would become a public cultivation treasure.

But at this moment, Ouyang Jiu'er said: "Brother Ye, there is still a good place in the Forbidden Ancient Well, where you can assist in cultivating the Forbidden Body, and you can quickly refine the Forbidden Body in a short period of time!

"And a good place like this?"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

This time, although he had obtained a lot of forbidden treasures, the usefulness of each forbidden treasure was different, for example, the forbidden black lotus he possessed himself was an auxiliary cultivation, but not every forbidden strange object was an auxiliary cultivation.

Moreover, even if a high-level forbidden strange object was used to assist in cultivation, there was no way for him to refine his forbidden body to the Xiaocheng realm in a short period of time.

Therefore, if you can elevate your forbidden body to the realm of Xiaocheng, it will definitely be a great opportunity!

"Of course there is such a good place!" Ouyang Jiu'er affirmed: "I've been looking for it for so long here, and now I'm finally a little eyebrow-raising!"

"Strictly speaking, the Forbidden Ancient Well is not a forbidden curiosity and a forbidden treasure, it is equivalent to a treasure land, and such a treasure land has a core origin. With our strength, we will definitely not be able to strip away the core origin, and even the invincible Dao Ancestor will not be able to do it. But there is definitely a place like the Origin Lake in a treasure land like the Forbidden Ancient Well, where the Forbidden Ancient Well Origin is an extremely high purity Dark Forbidden Power Origin, and it is easy to absorb, unlike the Dark Forbidden Power of the Dark Forbidden Domain, which is so difficult to absorb and refine. Once such a place is found, it becomes many times easier to refine the forbidden body!"

After Ouyang Jiu'er finished speaking, Ye Tian urged: "Jiu'er, then let's hurry up and find this place!"

"Good!"

Ouyang Jiu'er nodded.

If it were an ordinary person, she would definitely not take the other party there, but she has cooperated with Ye Tian many times, and the relationship is very good, and it just so happens that this time she meets again, so she will naturally take Ye Tian with her.

A few more days passed in the blink of an eye.

this day.

Ouyang Jiu'er finally determined the origin lake of the forbidden ancient well.

The area inside the Forbidden Ancient Well, an area shrouded in black mist.

Ye Tian and Ouyang Jiu'er came here, Ouyang Jiu'er stared at this black fog area and said, "This is it, the inside of this black fog area should be the Origin Lake." However, let's be careful, there will be a lot of visual and auditory hallucinations here, so ignore them. Moreover, the taboo rules here are extremely confusing, and it is difficult to get to the Origin Lake without a specific way. "

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, he followed Ouyang Jiu'er into this black fog area.

Sure enough, very clear visual and auditory hallucinations hit, and there were even clear figures hovering around him, and all kinds of terrifying or pleasant or weird sounds poured into his mind, even if he covered his ears, it was useless.

Ye Tian ignored it, otherwise once he fell into this kind of visual and auditory hallucination, the consequences would be very serious, at least it would only cause general terror, or at worst, he would be killed directly and silently.

After a while, Ye Tian followed Ouyang Jiu'er through this black mist area and came to a small lake.

This lake is filled with a gentle dark forbidden origin, far beyond the power of other dark taboos.

"Hurry up and cultivate!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said that he had also entered the Origin Lake, and he had even begun to absorb the Dark Forbidden Origin to refine his body.

"Forbidden Body!"

Ye Tian's heart moved, but he was not very surprised.

Before this, Ouyang Jiu'er definitely didn't condense the power of the dark taboo, nor did he have a forbidden body, but now he did, definitely because of the root of the forbidden divine tree.

After refining the roots of the Forbidden Divine Tree, Ouyang Jiu'er had mastered the power of the Dark Forbidden Tree, but it was relatively weak at first, and even now, her Forbidden Body was just getting started.

Ye Tian didn't waste any time, he entered the Origin Lake and began to use the dark forbidden power in the Origin Lake to refine his body.

At the same time, he also activated the time acceleration, so that he could absorb the power of the dark forbidden here more quickly.

Rumble!!!!!

The incomparably rich power of the dark forbidden tempered Ye Tian's own forbidden body, and the forbidden body increased at a speed visible to the naked eye.

Refreshing!

Ye Tian was very excited, this was the first time he had raised his forbidden body so quickly, if he followed this speed, it wouldn't be too long, he would be able to raise his forbidden body to forty percent, that is, the realm of Xiaocheng.

In the blink of an eye, a hundred years have passed.

And Ye Tian had been cultivating in the time-accelerated environment for millions of years, and the forbidden body had finally reached the realm of Xiaocheng, and it had reached the level of four into one.

However, this piece of Forbidden Origin Lake had already been consumed by Ye Tian and Ouyang Jiu'er.

Ye Tian was surprised to find that Ouyang Jiu'er's forbidden body had actually crossed from the beginner to the Xiaocheng realm in one step, and the improvement was much greater than him.

"It's worthy of a half-step domain ancestor, it's terrifying!"

Ye Tian muttered in his heart.

"Let's go, if this piece of Origin Lake wants to accumulate, I'm afraid it will take a long time, and at that time, we probably won't need the Origin Lake here!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, the two of them left the place and returned to the outside world.

Black Wind Mountain.

After Ye Tian came back, he began to understand the situation in the outside world.

These days, he has been cultivating, and he doesn't know what the situation is in the outside world, who took away that forbidden treasure?

After a while, the true ancestors of the Nine Extremes Legion informed Ye Tian of the specific situation.
